'''Tray''' was a member of the [[Freelies]].

==Biography==
Like all Freelies, she sabotaged the factories of [[Vorzyd IV]], to make the people realize that the job was not the main thing in a perfect society that the [[Vorzydiak]]s tried to built. [[Flip]] and her opposed the leader [[Grath (Vorzydiak)|Grath]], disagreeing with many of his ways. However, Flip actually wanted to keep the attention of his leader, in order to make Grath rely on him. He destroyed a building, killing many beings, including himself. Tray and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] tried to rescue him but it was too late.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Threat Within]]'' {{1st}}
